title: Create: TFMG Automation
description: Recipe for automation for "The Facktory Must Grow" using mechanicel extruder and smelting
body: This Mod adds recipes for bauxid, dirt, sulfur with the help of the mechanical Extruder it also adds recipes for lead (smelting tuff) and nickel(smelting limestone) so u can automate ur factory to the limits.
